//: Package manifest for the LLMode Web UI — a standalone React + Vite app.
//runtime: This is a SEPARATE service from the Python daemon; it talks to it over HTTP/WS using VITE_LLMODE_API. Run it only when you want the dashboard.
name: llmode-ui
//location: Sits inside the llmode repo at ui/ — one repo, two services.

scripts.//dev: Start the Vite dev server with hot-reload (default http://localhost:5173).
scripts.//build: Produce an optimized static bundle in dist/ (optionally served by the daemon later).
scripts.//preview: Serve the built bundle locally to sanity-check a production build.
